acceptance_criteria: Local and remote followers/following listed; pagination works; private accounts protected
description:
GET /api/v1/accounts/:id/followers returns accounts that follow the given account (from followers table for local accounts). GET /api/v1/accounts/:id/following returns accounts followed (from follows table). Both include local and remote accounts. Paginated by ID with Link header.

Test discipline:
- 5 followers from remote accounts → all 5 appear in followers list
- Following 3 local + 2 remote → all 5 appear in following list
- Pagination: limit=2 through 5 followers → receives all 5
- Unauthenticated request: public accounts show followers; private accounts require auth

Defensive programming:
- Private accounts (is_locked=true): followers/following lists only visible to self or followers
title: GET /api/v1/accounts/:id/followers and /following: paginated, local and remote
